race.comment: CAPTAINS MISTRESS NZ (3) stretched her unbeaten record for Jason Grimson to five when leading from wider to score by close to 10m in last week's Paleface Adios. That made it four from four at the mile and her other wins since switching from NZ had been by huge margins of between 18 and 25m. Has the speed to take full advantage of the low draw so it is hard to see how they stop her. HESITATE (11) has been kept fresh since his resuming win in the Bonanza at Melton. The wide draw hurts but he is three from three when second up and was good enough to place in last year's Eureka. DOUBLE LOU (1) worked to the front from wider when winning the Hondo Grattan narrowly last start, his third success in four tries at this circuit and distance this time in. The ace draw should see him competitive. MY ULTIMATE BARNEY (2) will find it hard to turn the tables on Captain Mistress through last week's third but he enjoys a better draw. FINAL DEADLINE NZ (9) just missed from this draw last start. Include.
